summary:
Claim: The stiffness of nylon toothbrush bristle filaments primarily depends on their diameter and length.  
Evidence: - Larger diameter increases resistance to bending due to greater cross-sectional area. - Longer filaments improve structural rigidity when properly anchored at the handle.  
Answer: A
